Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth

package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth
Authentication (AuthN) guards, servlet-layer filters, SPIs, and request-time helpers for juneau-rest-server.
Guard-level authentication (RestGuard)

BearerTokenGuard and ApiKeyGuard are framework-level guard implementations that run inside the Juneau request pipeline (after servlet routing). They stash the resolved Principal on the request under RestServerConstants.PRINCIPAL_ATTR so downstream handlers can read it via @Auth Principal or req.getAttributes().get(PRINCIPAL_ATTR).

Servlet-layer authentication (AuthFilter)

This package also ships a two-layer pluggable servlet-filter authentication framework that runs at the servlet container layer — before Juneau's request routing:

Layer 1 — Standalone filters: each concrete AuthFilter subclass (BearerTokenAuthFilter, ApiKeyAuthFilter) is also a jakarta.servlet.Filter and can be registered directly with a servlet container or Spring Boot's FilterRegistrationBean.

Layer 2 — AuthFilterChain orchestrator: composes multiple AuthFilter instances with first-success principal resolution, role aggregation across all successful filters, and all-failure aggregation into a single 401 response.

Optional<AuthResult> three-state contract

authenticate(HttpServletRequest) returns:

  • Optional.empty() — filter does not apply (no recognizable credentials).
  • throw AuthenticationException — credentials present but invalid.
  • Optional.of(AuthResult) — authentication succeeded.
Principal and role surface

On success the chain wraps the request in AuthenticatedRequestWrapper, which overrides HttpServletRequest.getUserPrincipal(), HttpServletRequest.isUserInRole(String), HttpServletRequest.getRemoteUser(), and ServletRequest.getAttribute(String) for the RestServerConstants.PRINCIPAL_ATTR key. This makes RoleBasedRestGuard and @Auth Principal arg injection work with zero changes.

SPIs

TokenValidator and ApiKeyStore are the backing SPIs for both the guard-level and filter-level authentication classes. No third-party crypto / JOSE dependency is pulled in by this package — users who want JWT verification add the optional juneau-rest-server-auth-jwt sub-module (which plugs into the TokenValidator SPI from this package).

See Also:
  • AuthN Guards
  • AuthN Filter Framework
Since:
10.0.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server
    REST Server API
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.jwt
    JWT bearer-token validation backed by com.nimbusds:nimbus-jose-jwt.
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth
    OAuth 2.0 / OIDC integration for the Juneau REST server.
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.saml
    SAML 2.0 assertion validation for the Juneau REST server, layered on the AuthFilter framework.
  • Class
    Description
    ApiKeyAuthFilter
    AuthFilter that authenticates requests via a raw API-key string.
    ApiKeyAuthFilter.Builder
    Builder class.
    ApiKeyAuthFilter.Source
    Source of the API-key string.
    ApiKeyGuard
    AuthN RestGuard that authenticates requests via a raw API-key string.
    ApiKeyGuard.Builder
    Builder class.
    ApiKeyGuard.Source
    Source of the API-key string.
    ApiKeyStore
    SPI for resolving a raw API key string to its associated Principal.
    Auth
    Marks a @RestOp-method parameter as the authenticated Principal for the current request.
    AuthArg
    Resolves @RestOp-method parameters that represent the authenticated Principal.
    AuthenticatedRequestWrapper
    An HttpServletRequestWrapper that surfaces the filter-resolved Principal and aggregated roles via the standard servlet API surface.
    AuthenticationException
    Specialization of Unauthorized thrown by BearerTokenGuard, ApiKeyGuard, and user-supplied TokenValidator / ApiKeyStore implementations to signal AuthN failure.
    Authenticator
    Lowest-level authentication contract shared by the servlet-filter layer (AuthFilter, AuthFilterChain) and the resource layer (RestAuthenticator).
    AuthFilter
    Abstract base class for Juneau authentication servlet filters.
    AuthFilterChain
    Orchestrates multiple AuthFilter instances with first-success principal resolution, role aggregation, and all-failure aggregation semantics.
    AuthFilterChain.Builder
    Builder class.
    AuthResult
    Immutable value type returned by Authenticator.authenticate(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest) on success.
    AuthResult.MergeMode
    Controls how an AuthResult merges with results accumulated earlier in an authenticator chain.
    AuthResultAccumulator
    Mutable helper that folds a sequence of AuthResults into a single result, honoring AuthResult.MergeMode.
    BearerTokenAuthFilter
    AuthFilter that authenticates requests via the RFC 6750 Bearer Token scheme.
    BearerTokenAuthFilter.Builder
    Builder class.
    BearerTokenGuard
    AuthN RestGuard that authenticates requests via the RFC 6750 Bearer Token scheme.
    BearerTokenGuard.Builder
    Builder class.
    ClaimsPrincipal
    A Principal that exposes typed read-only access to a map of claims.
    RestAuthenticator
    Resource-level authentication SPI for @Rest resources.
    RestAuthenticator.Null
    Sentinel "unset" type for @Rest(authenticator=...); never authenticates.
    TokenValidator
    SPI for verifying an opaque bearer token and producing the associated Principal.
